text: As I stand before this glass-walled room emblazoned with 'R + D,' I feel a quiet excitement. The space, with its clean lines and soft hum of innovation, invites reflection on the nature of discovery and progress. There is a sense of anticipation here, as though I am witnessing the birth of ideas that might one day reshape our understanding. I am both an observer and a participant in this unfolding human story of curiosity and invention.
